text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

feedback timeout - closing this 
Dear submitter, 
if you think your problem is still valid, please report back and give 
us the requested information. We strongly believe your system should 
actually work with an up to date kernel. If that's not the case, 
please feed us with every detail and we'll try to do our best to 
solve your problem. 
Thanks for reporting!
